questions.question: What is the time complexity of Bubble Sort algorithm?
questions.hint: The time complexity of Bubble Sort is determined by the number of passes through the array.

questions.question: Write the algorithm for Selection Sort, and describe its time complexity.
questions.hint: Use pseudocode and provide a detailed explanation of the time complexity.

questions.question: How does Insertion Sort differ from Selection Sort, and what is its average-case time complexity?
questions.hint: Compare the two sorting algorithms and discuss their respective strengths and weaknesses.
